evals.expected_output: impl/core-logic branch created. Each spec step executed in order with commits. Spec status updated to in-progress then complete. All deliverables present at specified paths.
assertions: Branch has at least one commit per major spec step
spec.md frontmatter status updated to in-progress before implementation begins
spec.md frontmatter status updated to complete when all steps are done
All files listed in spec.md ## Deliverables table exist at their specified paths
No deliverable file is empty or contains only placeholder content
Test files exist for each test tier specified in spec.md ## Testing Strategy
Test files are committed before the implementation files they cover
Skill does not start if spec.md status is not approved
Skill does not push the branch to remote
Skill does not merge the branch

evals.prompt: Implement core-logic (when working tree is not clean)
evals.expected_output: Skill detects uncommitted changes, reports them, and stops without starting implementation.
assertions: Skill checks git status before starting
Skill does not create a branch
Skill does not modify any files
